attributes.name: locked
attributes.description: Determine the inputs locked state.

attributes.name: unlock-label
attributes.description: Define the label for the unlock button.

attributes.name: lock-label
attributes.description: Define the label for the lock button.

attributes.name: min
attributes.description:
Sets the min value of the input.
Examples: the first date the user may pick in date and datetime-local, or the min numeric value the user can pick in a number input.

attributes.name: minlength
attributes.description: Sets the minimum length of the value of the input.

attributes.name: minlength-message
attributes.description: Minlength validation message.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description:
Sets the max value of the input.
Examples: the last date the user may pick in date and datetime-local, or the max numeric value the user can pick in a number input.

attributes.name: maxlength
attributes.description: Sets the maximum length of the value of the input.

attributes.name: maxlength-message
attributes.description: Maxlength validation message.

attributes.name: step
attributes.description: Specifies the interval between legal numbers of the input

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the input.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Sets the input to readonly mode, meaning value cannot be changed but still able to read and select its content.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Defines the input placeholder.

attributes.name: autocomplete
attributes.description: Defines the input autocomplete.

attributes.name: auto-width
attributes.description: Sets the input width to fit the value or placeholder if empty

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: This property specifies the type of input that will be rendered.

attributes.name: inputmode
attributes.description: The inputmode global attribute is an enumerated attribute that hints at the type of data that might be entered by the user while editing the element or its contents. This allows a browser to display an appropriate virtual keyboard.

attributes.name: pattern
attributes.description: Validates the input based on the Regex pattern

attributes.name: tabindex
attributes.description: Set the input tabindex, set this to `-1` to avoid tabbing into the input.

attributes.name: spellcheck
attributes.description: get/set native spellcheck attribute

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: get/set the name of the input

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: get/set the value of the input

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Apply validation rule for requiring a value of this form control.

attributes.name: required-message
attributes.description: Required validation message.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Apply custom error on this input.

attributes.name: error-message
attributes.description: Custom error message.

attributes.name: pristine
attributes.description: Determines wether the form control has been touched or interacted with, this determines wether the validation-status of this form control should be made visible.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

properties.name: formAssociated
properties.description: This is a static class field indicating that the element is can be used inside a native form and participate in its events. It may require a polyfill, check support here https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/attachInternals.  Read more about form controls here https://web.dev/more-capable-form-controls/

slots.name: prepend
slots.description: for components to render to the left of the input.

slots.name: append
slots.description: for components to render to the right of the input.
